calendar.matters:
Apportionment Of Settlement Funds And Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-08-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Paul Vaillancourt, Esq. for Petitioner: Ketti West-Hamilton, as Guardian at litem for: Jeanette Anderson, a minor Claimant, appearance waived.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $7,965.02
Costs $$1,366.44
A net balance of $23,895.03 to be deposited into a blocked account with Key Bank, 19830 S.E. Hwy. 212, Clackamas, OR. 97015, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
